_doc: Vault filter: only single-token vaults pass, and only when the token is a USD stable (ALL_USD_STABLES expands interim from the Yields stablecoin flag); two-token pairs and vaults with 3+ tokens are excluded; then min_tvl_usd applies. exclude_memecoins is a documented no-op. exploits: when enabled, DeFiLlama hacks are joined per protocol (brand_wide = any version under the same parent is counted) and merged as a top-level exploits block; the -15xN penalty is applied later in the score skill, not here. audit_triage: when enabled, each protocol's free DeFiLlama audits code (0=none/1=partial/2=audited/3=fork) is merged as a top-level audit_triage block from the same /protocols fetch; quality verification/grading is the separate research-audit skill.
